description: T209 SubscriptionPlanOrchestrator MUST call Number.isInteger(priceCents) && priceCents > 0 at executionOrder=1 â€” before SETNX, before any write. Float prices rejected immediately.
resolution: Number.isInteger(priceCents) && priceCents > 0 check at ORDER 1 before SETNX. Float price at ORDER 1 = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: T209 accepts float values for priceCents
Number.isInteger(priceCents) check absent or not at executionOrder=1
SETNX or storeDocument called before price integer validation
passConditions: Number.isInteger(priceCents) && priceCents > 0 check at executionOrder=1
float price returns DataProcessResult.failure before any SETNX or storeDocument call

description: T209 MUST use storeDocumentWithOCC(plan, versionPin) â€” NOT plain storeDocument(). OCC_CONFLICT must emit SubscriptionPlanPublicationFailed and return failure.
resolution: T209 calls storeDocumentWithOCC(plan, versionPin) at ORDER 6. Using plain storeDocument() = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: T209 calls plain storeDocument() for subscription plan write
OCC not used for plan publication in T209
storeDocumentWithOCC(plan, versionPin) absent from T209
passConditions: T209 calls storeDocumentWithOCC(plan, versionPin) at executionOrder=6
OCC_CONFLICT emits SubscriptionPlanPublicationFailed and returns DataProcessResult.failure

description: T211 RecurringBillingEngine MUST call getStatus() at ORDER 1 before lock acquisition at ORDER 2. CANCELLED/PAUSED subscriptions must return InvoiceVoided without acquiring a lock. DPO conflict: conflictsWith FLOW-09-T107-seat-before-payment.
resolution: getStatus() at ORDER 1, lock at ORDER 2. CANCELLED â†’ InvoiceVoided, no lock. Lock before status check = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: T211 acquires lock before checking subscription status
CANCELLED or PAUSED subscriptions acquire lock before returning InvoiceVoided
getStatus() not at executionOrder=1 in T211
dpoConflict annotation conflictsWith FLOW-09-T107-seat-before-payment absent
passConditions: T211 calls getStatus() at executionOrder=1 before lock acquisition at executionOrder=2
CANCELLED subscription returns InvoiceVoided without acquiring lock
dpoConflict annotation conflictsWith FLOW-09-T107-seat-before-payment present

description: T211 RecurringBillingEngine dunning retry schedule MUST come from FREEDOM config key 'subscription_billing_dunning_schedule' â€” NEVER a hardcoded array constant. maxAttempts must equal dunningSchedule.length.
resolution: freedom.getConfig('subscription_billing_dunning_schedule') drives dunning. Hardcoded DUNNING_SCHEDULE constant = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: T211 uses hardcoded DUNNING_SCHEDULE constant array
dunning retry schedule not read from FREEDOM config key subscription_billing_dunning_schedule
maxAttempts hardcoded instead of derived from dunningSchedule.length
passConditions: T211 calls freedom.getConfig('subscription_billing_dunning_schedule') for dunning schedule
maxAttempts === dunningSchedule.length (derived from FREEDOM config)
no hardcoded DUNNING_SCHEDULE constant in T211

description: T212 SubscriptionAnalyticsAggregator MUST have handlers for BOTH SubscriptionActivated (add path) AND SubscriptionCancelled (subtract path). Additive-only aggregation permanently inflates MRR. normalizeMrr() formula is MACHINE â€” ANNUAL=Math.floor(priceCents/12), CUSTOM=Math.floor(priceCents/intervalDays*30).
resolution: T212 has @EventPattern handlers for SubscriptionActivated AND SubscriptionCancelled. Missing subtract handler = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: T212 only subscribes to SubscriptionActivated without SubscriptionCancelled handler
MRR aggregate only increases, never decreases on cancellation
subtract path missing from T212
passConditions: T212 has @EventPattern('SubscriptionActivated') handler adding to MRR
T212 has @EventPattern('SubscriptionCancelled') handler subtracting from MRR
normalizeMrr(): ANNUAL=Math.floor(priceCents/12), CUSTOM=Math.floor(priceCents/intervalDays*30)

description: T212 SubscriptionMetricsUpdated CloudEvent MUST NOT contain a subscriberId field â€” metrics are tenant-level aggregates only. Individual subscriber data must not leak into analytics events.
resolution: SubscriptionMetricsUpdated has no subscriberId field. Including subscriberId in metrics event = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: SubscriptionMetricsUpdated CloudEvent includes subscriberId field
individual subscriber data leaks into tenant-level analytics aggregate event
T212 includes subscriberId in metrics payload
passConditions: SubscriptionMetricsUpdated event contains no subscriberId field
metrics events contain only tenant-level aggregates (mrrDelta, planId, tenantId)
no subscriber-level PII in any T212 emitted events

description: T210 SubscriptionLifecycleManager MUST store paymentMethodId (vault reference) only â€” paymentMethodToken (raw client token) must NEVER appear in any stored document. Storing raw tokens places the database in PCI scope.
resolution: T210 stores paymentMethodId (vault ref). Storing paymentMethodToken = BUILD_FAILURE per CF-12-4.
blockConditions: T210 stores paymentMethodToken (raw client token) in any document
raw payment token present in xiigen-subscriptions or xiigen-billing-audit index
database enters PCI scope due to raw token storage in T210
passConditions: T210 stores only paymentMethodId (vault reference token)
paymentMethodToken never appears in storeDocument arguments in T210
only vault reference IDs stored in payment-related fields

description: T209 SubscriptionPlanOrchestrator: xiigen-subscription-plans index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant plan reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: subscription plan record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored plan record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Subscription plan records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-subscription-plans reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

description: T210 SubscriptionLifecycleManager: xiigen-subscriptions index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant subscription reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: subscription record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored subscription record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Subscription records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-subscriptions reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

description: T211 RecurringBillingEngine: xiigen-invoices and xiigen-billing-audit indexes are PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant invoice reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: invoice record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
billing audit record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored invoice record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Invoice and billing audit records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-invoices and xiigen-billing-audit reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

description: T212 SubscriptionAnalyticsAggregator: xiigen-mrr-metrics index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant MRR reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: MRR metric record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored metrics record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: MRR metric records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-mrr-metrics reads include tenantId predicate from ALS
